ead.archdesc:

English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Utah family time use surveys an eleven state urban rural comparison
no primary creator
Walker, Kathryn E., 1917-
McCullough, Jane F.
United States. Department of Agriculture
Utah Agricultural Experiment Station
Technical Committee for NE-113 (U.S.)
8642
7 cubic feet. 7 cubic feet.
1977-1978. Printed Materials. Surveys and the bulletin describing the NE-113 study. Collection material in English 10316691
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
September 2018
EAD encoding:
Ben Wrubel, September 2018
Date modified:
RMC Staff, September 2018
Biographical / Historical
In 1977, eleven states collaborated under the direction of Cornell Professor Kathryn Walker to do time-use surveys. Each state was responsible for collecting the time-use data from residents of their respective state. While there were a set of questions common to all eleven states, each state could add questions on associated issues. The project was funded by an Interstate USDA grant and was sponsored by the Agricultural Experiment Stations of California, Connecticut, Louisiana, New York, North Carolina, Ohio, Oregon, Utah, Virginia, and Wisconsin.
The Cornell Institute for Social and Economic Research (CISER) has the digitized data collected in the eleven states from the common questions that were used.
This collection contains uncoded data on diet, time-use, gender roles, etc. of Utah families that were surveyed by the Utah component of the 1977 eleven state survey. 210, two parent, two child families, half living in urban areas and half living in rural areas of Utah were surveyed and Professor Jane McCullough of Utah State University was the princiapl investigator.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Surveys and the bulletin describing the NE-113 study.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Family Time Use an Eleven-State Urban/Rural Comparison Bulletin
Cite As:
Utah Family Time Use Surveys, #8642 . Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Restrictions on Use:
Until 2068, the names and addresses of individuals cannot be disclosed in writing or other publication medium unless the individual gives express written permission. All users of this collection will sign an agreement to abide by this restriction.
Home economics -- United States. Time management surveys -- United States.
